DELIMITER $$

CREATE TRIGGER `before_update_legal_thirdparty`
BEFORE UPDATE ON `legal_third_party`
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    DECLARE duplicate_count INT;

    -- Check if the new code already exists in another record
    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO duplicate_count
    FROM legal_third_party
    WHERE code = NEW.code AND id != OLD.id;

    -- If a duplicate exists, prevent the update
    IF duplicate_count > 0 THEN
        SIGNAL SQLSTATE '45000'
        SET MESSAGE_TEXT = 'Error: Duplicate code not allowed!';
    END IF;
END$$

DELIMITER ;
